figures.caption: TABLE III: System-level comparison of classification accuracy between the original Smatable system [1], the improved model [13], and our proposed system across three data splitting methods with the best configuration.

Fig. 1: Top: Hardware concept including circuit schematic from one channel of the 9-channel AFE setup, Down: (left) results from the frequency response analysis from AFE input to analog-digital-converter (ADC) input, (middle) results from the total harmonic distortion analysis at the ADC input, (right) results from the noise transient measurement.
Fig. 2: Image of the assembled hardware design [110mm×90mm] with a zoom on channel of the analog front-end from Figure 1.
Fig. 4: Signal of a swipe right gesture on one channel in raw form and after pre-processing (including band-pass filtering, event detection, and window sequencing).
Fig. 6: (Top) Top view of the interaction table (160 cm × 80 cm). (Bottom) Bottom view with sensor placement and a zoomed-in sensor unit.
